scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run start:dev --workspace backend" "npm run start --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:stop: lsof -ti:3001,4200 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Nothing to stop'
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:generate --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
